texto: Don’t be vain because you happen to have talent. You are not responsible for that
autor: it was not of your doing. What you do with your talent is what matters.
explicacao: Citação de it was not of your doing. What you do with your talent is what matters. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Don’t be vain because you happen to have talent. You are not responsible for that” articula reflexao, pablo-casals, because em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
